evals.name: rename-ec-order-flow
evals.prompt: Rename the file docs/ec/orders/訂單出貨流程.md to a proper English kebab-case filename. This file has cross-references in at least 5 other files and in zensical.toml. Use check first to preview, then rename.
evals.expected_output: File renamed to order-shipping-flow.md. All wikilinks [[訂單出貨流程]] updated to [[order-shipping-flow]]. All markdown links ](訂單出貨流程.md) updated to ](order-shipping-flow.md). zensical.toml nav path updated. Frontmatter permalink updated.

evals.name: rename-pos-auto-close
evals.prompt: Rename docs/pos/orders/設定 POS 訂單自動結案.md to pos-auto-close.md. This file is in the POS section. Use check first to preview, then rename.
evals.expected_output: File renamed to pos-auto-close.md. zensical.toml nav path updated. Frontmatter permalink updated. No wikilink references found.
files: docs/pos/orders/設定 POS 訂單自動結案.md

evals.name: scan-chinese-files
evals.prompt: Show me all the Chinese-named files in the docs/ec/orders/ directory and tell me which ones need their permalink fixed.
evals.expected_output: List of Chinese-named .md files in docs/ec/orders/ with permalink status marked (✅ or ⚠️ no permalink).
